accountId().details: Returns the account id of the smart account

returns.accountImplementationId: the account id of the smart account MUST return a non-empty string The accountId SHOULD be structured like so:        "vendorname.accountname.semver" The id SHOULD be unique across all smart accounts

supportsExecutionMode(bytes32).details: Function to check if the account supports a certain execution mode (see above)

params.encodedMode: the encoded mode MUST return true if the account supports the mode and false otherwise

supportsModule(uint256).details: Function to check if the account supports a certain module typeId

params.moduleTypeId: the module type ID according to the ERC-7579 spec MUST return true if the account supports the module type and false otherwise
